base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_heart_container — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1986 legend of zelda. Heart Container — large red heart. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Heart Container — large red heart; permanently increases max HP by 1; one per dungeon + 4 scattered in overworld
